name: Marco Rubio
subject: I’m a glass half full kind of guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45340489:6dNRr4LsN:m:1:1349778030:B33753AB044EB22DADD25E8676B1615E:r)
---
| | | | Peter, I'm used to being attacked. In fact when I announced my candidacy for President, I expected it. But I expected to see my opponents and the liberal media to throw discredited personal attacks my way, while my campaign tried to focus on the issues and our plans for the country. This weekend we saw something a little different: This Sunday, on CNN, I talked about the dire threats to our national security and what I'd do about them, and then did some debate prep that afternoon. _Meanwhile, Politico, a favorite publication of D.C. insiders, was pushing a nearly 2,000 word article about . . .[**how I drink water while I'm on the campaign trail.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45340490:6dNRr4LsN:m:1:1349778030:B33753AB044EB22DADD25E8676B1615E:r)_ This is the kind of absurdity our campaign is up against -- we want to talk about serious issues, and the conservative plans I have to fix them, while the D.C. media and the Establishment are obsessing over things like my hydration regimen. Peter, we know our campaign has Hillary Clinton and the Democrats scared. They know we are going to put them in hot water, and they are pulling out every trick in their book to stop you from supporting me. If this campaign is about the issues, and who has a vision to keep America safe and prosperous in the 21st Century, we're going to win. But the media and the Establishment want it otherwise. I need your immediate help, Peter, to fight back -- and keep this campaign focused on the things that matter. [_**Will you follow this link right now to chip in whatever you can afford right now? A gift of $25, $50, or even $100 will definitely make a huge splash for our campaign.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45340490:6dNRr4LsN:m:1:1349778030:B33753AB044EB22DADD25E8676B1615E:r) After seven years of economic stagnation and diminished American strength, the country's thirst for new leadership is real and growing. It's time we left behind the failed policies that are crippling the American Dream and begin a New American Century of restored freedom and promise! [_**The tide is rising for our campaign. Will you chip in?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45340490:6dNRr4LsN:m:1:1349778030:B33753AB044EB22DADD25E8676B1615E:r) Thanks for your support, Marco RubioRepublican Candidate for President
PS. If this is the worst thing Politico can say about our campaign, then we're on the right track. However while this attack may just be a drop in the bucket, we need to answer it loudly. [**_Peter, in order to fight back and run a strong campaign, I need you to step up and join our campaign by making an instant online donation right now of $25, $50, $100, or more right now._ Thank you for your support.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45340490:6dNRr4LsN:m:1:1349778030:B33753AB044EB22DADD25E8676B1615E:r)
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45340491:6dNRr4LsN:m:1:1349778030:B33753AB044EB22DADD25E8676B1615E:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: jeff.r@tedcruz.org
subject: this may have been an oversight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
| Friend,

Ted asked me to email you to let you know he's running out of time...(you can read his original message below).

You may have seen Ted's surge in the polls, _BUT it means nothing if we can't raise the funds to stay in the race._

Click the secure link below to make your donation and have it instantly doubled:

[**Yes, DOUBLE My Gift >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32221996:sQMSpKyN2:m:1:1104269936:F723794F471880D070B8F56ED047B75F:r)

**^ ^ This link is only good for five more days.**

Let me break it down for you -- $25 is now worth $50, $50 instantly doubles to $100, and $1000 turns into $2000.

We've only made it this far with your support, **but can Ted and I count on you again?**

I'm sitting down with Ted on Monday night before the debate...and I REALLY want to have good news for him.

Thanks,

-Jeff

Campaign Manager, Cruz for President

\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---
**From:** ted@tedcruz.org
**To:** jeff.r@tedcruz.org
**Date:** Thurs. 12/10/2015
**Subject:** (2) New Messages
---|---
|
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32221996:sQMSpKyN2:m:1:1104269936:F723794F471880D070B8F56ED047B75F:r) |
---|---|---
---
| Jeff,

This might be the email that makes the difference between WINNING AND LOSING.

Jeff, this really could make the difference.

If you are among the thousands who have responded to my matching-gift campaign -- **I want to say thank you.**

You are sustaining this campaign and are making the difference.

But unfortunately, there are thousands who haven't managed to respond. AND with just six days left...time is of the essence.

**[That's why I'm sitting down to write you now, one more time, and ask for your help.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32221996:sQMSpKyN2:m:1:1104269936:F723794F471880D070B8F56ED047B75F:r)**

Will you put aside what you are doing right now and take just a moment to **give a matched gift that will instantly double its value?**

For just a few more days, your donation of $25 is now worth $50, your donation of $50 instantly doubles to $100, OR if you can afford a donation of $1000, it will now be worth $2000!

[** DOUBLE MY GIFT » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32221997:sQMSpKyN2:m:1:1104269936:F723794F471880D070B8F56ED047B75F:r)

Jeff, it is hard for me to explain how important this matching program truly is, but it could really mean the difference between winning and losing.

With your support, and the support of the generous donors providing the match -- I can win this!

If you can help my campaign today, I would be forever grateful.

I trust you will respond to my urgent request as soon as you can.

With just weeks before the first votes are about to be cast -- I need every last ounce of support I can get.

[**Will you dig deep and support my campaign?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32221996:sQMSpKyN2:m:1:1104269936:F723794F471880D070B8F56ED047B75F:r)

Whatever you can donate right now will be worth twice as much. Heidi and I will be forever grateful.

Thank you for everything you do.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

|

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org

---

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Too close for comfort
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---

Friend --

That was close. _Too close_. Because of the stubbornness of Republicans in Washington, including Senator Pat Toomey, **the federal government came dangerously close to shutting down at midnight last night.**

With some fast, last minute deal-making, Congress managed to avoid the shutdown for another couple of days, but friend, our country cannot continue to operate like this.

**[We need Katie in Washington to keep our government doing what it does best -- helping middle and working class families get ahead. Chip in $5 here, so that we can send her to the U.S Senate to fight for us.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8244079803573993472/5247277406560976896?refcode=e20151212&refcode2=e20151212nd&amount=5)**

Parents across America sit down at their kitchen tables at night, trying to figure out how they are going to pay their bills and budget as responsibly as they can. Our representatives in Congress need to do the same, and right now, they are failing spectacularly.

**Kicking the can down the road and governing by crisis is no way to map out the economic security of our country 's future**, and the ineptness of senators like Pat Toomey, who have allowed it to get this far, is unacceptable. We cannot run a country, grow an economy, or provide for our families if Republicans in Congress are constantly taking us to the brink of disaster.

**[In order to have a real chance at winning this election and making a difference in Washington, Katie needs us standing by her side. Can we count on you? Contribute $5 right now to help Katie win her race.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8244079803573993472/5247277406560976896?refcode=e20151212&refcode2=e20151212nd&amount=5)**

Thanks as always for your support,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8244079803573993472/5247277406560976896?refcode=e20151212&refcode2=e20151212nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8244079803573993472/5175219812523048960).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: No airplanes, no guns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

As the violent events of the past weeks unfolded around the world and here at home, I watched the coverage and read reports about the horrific attacks. Like every American, I remain deeply troubled by the acts of terrorism that occurred in Paris and in San Bernardino.

I'm also troubled by the response from politicians. I wrote a letter urging Congress to pass a measure preventing those on the Terrorist Watchlist from purchasing firearms, and Republicans -- including my opponents for Senate, Ron DeSantis and David Jolly -- refused to even bring it to a vote.

**As it stands now, suspected terrorists who we prevent from boarding airplanes can walk into a gun shop and buy a deadly weapon. In the past 10 years, more than 2,000 suspects on the FBI's Terrorist Watchlist legally bought guns.**

Anyone who deserves to be a Senator should be able to rise above the current dysfunction and close the terrorist-gun loophole. **Floridians and Americans everywhere deserve this basic protection.**

[**Join me in calling on all the Republican Senate candidates to work with me to put aside partisan politics and close the loophole to make our country a safer place.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae219f/738133e4/3bfacc23/7f83739c/1836725704/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151212m")

I agree that the FBI's Terrorist Watchlist is not perfect. But instead of bending to the will of the NRA and refusing to take any action at all, the GOP could be working with us on a bipartisan plan to fix it.

We're still investigating the terrorist attack in San Bernardino, and as a member of the House Intelligence Committee, I can promise I will work hard to get all the facts.

We need to keep dangerous weapons out of the hands of those we suspect have dangerous intentions, and closing the terrorist-gun loophole is a common-sense way to do it.

Senate Republicans recently voted against legislation closing the loophole. You better believe if I was in the Senate I would have voted proudly alongside my fellow Democrats to pass it. [**That 's why I'm calling on anyone running to be our next Senator to join me and work to close the loophole. Add your name to stand with me and demand the same.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae219f/738133e4/3bfacc23/7f83739c/1836725704/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151212m")

Thank you,

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae219f/738133e4/3bfacc23/7f83739d/1836725704/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae219f/738133e4/3bfacc23/7f83739e/1836725704/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae219f/738133e4/3bfacc23/7f83739f/1836725704/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: They don't want to talk about us
body:
#
Dear Brothers and Sisters,
I've always been interested in media and have always been concerned that corporate media doesn't really educate people in this country. They refuse to talk about the serious issues facing our country.
That's why I wasn't surprised yesterday when I saw this headline: **" Report: ABC _World News Tonight_ Has Devoted 81 Minutes To Trump, One Minute To Sanders."**
It's no shock to me that big networks, which are controlled by a handful of large corporations, have barely discussed our campaign and the important issues we are bringing up. They're just too busy covering Donald Trump.
We can't allow the corporate media to set the agenda. We have got to get the real issues out there. And that's why I'm asking you to join me in a major petition to the big networks.
[**Add your name to our petition to tell ABC, NBC and CBS to cover our campaign -- and more importantly to cover the issues we are bringing up.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2977/43f17890/4c4cb932/62170a0b/3340316712/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/corporate-media?source=em151212full")
This is what the corporate media is all about: more Americans support our campaign than Trump's according to recent polls, but still ABC's news program has spent 81 minutes on Trump and only 20 seconds talking about us. NBC _Nightly News_ only spent 2.9 minutes covering our campaign. CBS? They spent six minutes.
The point is: our political revolution certainly will not be televised. It's more important than ever for us to hold the large corporations that control the media accountable.
[**Please sign our petition to tell the big networks to put aside their corporate interests and allow for a free and fair debate in this presidential campaign.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2977/43f17890/4c4cb932/62170a0b/3340316712/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/corporate-media?source=em151212full")
I know we can win this fight if we all work to get the message out there.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Sign the petition](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2977/43f17890/4c4cb932/62170a0b/3340316712/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/corporate-media?source=em151212full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2977/43f17890/4c4cb932/62170a08/3340316712/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2977/43f17890/4c4cb932/62170a09/3340316712/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2977/43f17890/4c4cb932/62170a36/3340316712/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2977/43f17890/4c4cb932/62170a37/3340316712/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Dear Brothers and Sisters, I've always been interested in media and have always been concerned that corporate media doesn't really educate people in this country. They refuse to talk about the serious issues facing our country. That's why I wasn't surprised yesterday when I saw this headline: " Report: ABC World News Tonight Has Devoted 81 Minutes To Trump, One Minute To Sanders." It's no shock to me that big networks, which are controlled by a handful of large corporations, have barely discussed our campaign and the important issues we are bringing up. They're just too busy covering Donald Trump. We can't allow the corporate media to set the agenda. We have got to get the real issues out there. And that's why I'm asking you to join me in a major petition to the big networks. "" This is what the corporate media is all about: more Americans support our campaign than Trump's according to recent polls, but still ABC's news program has spent 81 minutes on Trump and only 20 seconds talking about us. NBC Nightly News only spent 2.9 minutes covering our campaign. CBS? They spent six minutes. The point is: our political revolution certainly will not be televised. It's more important than ever for us to hold the large corporations that control the media accountable. "" I know we can win this fight if we all work to get the message out there. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Hillary Clinton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
A little something to take with you. | Friend --
I'm asking you to step up before 2015 comes to a close and give just $1 to show you support this campaign -- when you do, we'll send you your personalized supporter card in the mail.

This isn't about the money. It's about knowing you're with me as we head into an election year -- and it's about giving you something to show for it!

**Pitch in $1 before tomorrow to support this campaign, and get your card:**

[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQyMjc3NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMjcyNzg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.

name: Ricky Martin
subject: Join me as a member of LGBT for Hillary!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
I'm proud to stand with Hillary. | Friend --

I'm so excited to ask you this: Would you like to join me as a member of LGBT and our allies for Hillary?

Today, we're launching this new group of Hillary fans who are committed to continuing the fight for full equality for all Americans -- regardless of gender or sexuality. Hillary said it best: "Gay rights are human rights, and human rights are gay rights."

Hillary has been a fighter for us for years, from supporting equal workplace legislation to working for equal rights for trans Americans. Now we're standing with her. **[Will you join us?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=34&ms=MjQyMjgxNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMjkzNDQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Growing up in the U.S. territory of Puerto Rico, I never dreamed that I would one day be a proud, out gay father of two beautiful little boys, in a country where marriage equality was the law of the land. Now, that's just an average day -- that's what real progress is.

Hillary knows this, and she's not going to stop fighting. But in order to protect and build on the progress we’ve made, we need to win this election. And that means we need you. **Join LGBT for Hillary today, and let’s get started:** | [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjQyMjgxNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMjkzNDQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjQyMjgxNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMjkzNDQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Ricky

P.S. If you’d like to support this fight in other ways, [**become a founding donor to LGBT for Hillary right now by chipping in $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQyMjgxNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMjkzNDQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) \-- and thank you.

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
